title: Greetings and Introductions
prompt: Practice greeting someone and introducing yourself in English.
hint: Use phrases like 'Good morning', 'How are you?', and 'My name is...'.
sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

ja.prompt: 英語で誰かに挨拶して自己紹介を練習しましょう。
ja.hint: 'Good morning', 'How are you?', 'My name is...' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

zh.prompt: 練習用英語問候和自我介紹。
zh.hint: 使用像是 'Good morning', 'How are you?', 'My name is...' 的句子。
zh.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

title: Asking About Objects
prompt: Ask and answer questions about objects using 'What is this?' and 'What is that?'.
hint: Use simple nouns to name objects, e.g., 'It's a book.', 'It's a pencil.'.
sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

ja.prompt: 'What is this?' と 'What is that?' を使って物について質問し答えましょう。
ja.hint: 簡単な名詞を使って物の名前を言いましょう。例：'It's a book.', 'It's a pencil.'.
ja.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

zh.prompt: 用 'What is this?' 和 'What is that?' 問物品並回答。
zh.hint: 使用簡單名詞命名物品，例如 'It's a book.', 'It's a pencil.'。
zh.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

title: Talking About Abilities
prompt: Practice asking and answering about abilities using 'Can you...?' and 'Yes, I can.' or 'No, I can't.'.
hint: Use verbs like 'swim', 'jump', 'dance' to talk about abilities.
sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

ja.prompt: 'Can you...?' を使って能力について質問し、'Yes, I can.' または 'No, I can't.' で答えましょう。
ja.hint: 'swim', 'jump', 'dance' のような動詞を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Can you...?' 問能力，並用 'Yes, I can.' 或 'No, I can't.' 回答。
zh.hint: 使用像 'swim', 'jump', 'dance' 的動詞談能力。
zh.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

title: Talking About Age
prompt: Practice asking and telling someone's age using 'How old are you?' and 'I am ... years old.'.
hint: Use numbers to say age, e.g., 'I am five years old.'
sample: How old are you? I am five years old.

ja.prompt: 'How old are you?' と 'I am ... years old.' を使って年齢を尋ねたり答えたりしましょう。
ja.hint: 数字を使って年齢を言いましょう。例：'I am five years old.'
ja.sample: How old are you? I am five years old.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'How old are you?' 問年齡，並用 'I am ... years old.' 回答。
zh.hint: 用數字說年齡，例如 'I am five years old.'
zh.sample: How old are you? I am five years old.

title: Talking About Favorite Subjects and Sports
prompt: Talk about your favorite school subjects and sports activities.
hint: Use phrases like 'My favorite subject is...', 'I like basketball.', and 'I play basketball every day.'.
sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like basketball. I play basketball every day.

ja.prompt: 好きな教科やスポーツについて話しましょう。
ja.hint: 'My favorite subject is...', 'I like basketball.', 'I play basketball every day.' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like basketball. I play basketball every day.

zh.prompt: 談論你喜歡的科目和運動。
zh.hint: 使用像 'My favorite subject is...', 'I like basketball.', 'I play basketball every day.' 的句子。
zh.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like basketball. I play basketball every day.

title: Asking for and Giving Directions
prompt: Practice asking for and giving directions to places like the post office or science museum.
hint: Use phrases like 'Excuse me, where is the ...?', 'Go straight and turn right.', 'It's on your left.'
sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

ja.prompt: 郵便局や科学館などの場所への道案内を尋ねたり教えたりしましょう。
ja.hint: 'Excuse me, where is the ...?', 'Go straight and turn right.', 'It's on your left.' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

zh.prompt: 練習問路和給路線，例如郵局或科學館。
zh.hint: 使用 'Excuse me, where is the ...?', 'Go straight and turn right.', 'It's on your left.' 等句子。
zh.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

title: Talking About Weather and Clothing
prompt: Describe the weather and what clothes to wear.
hint: Use phrases like 'It's cold and windy.', 'Put on your coat.', 'It's snowing.'
sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat. It's snowing.

ja.prompt: 天気や着る服について説明しましょう。
ja.hint: 'It's cold and windy.', 'Put on your coat.', 'It's snowing.' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat. It's snowing.

zh.hint: 使用 'It's cold and windy.', 'Put on your coat.', 'It's snowing.' 等句子。
zh.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat. It's snowing.

title: Shopping and Asking Prices
prompt: Practice shopping conversations by asking prices and buying items.
hint: Use phrases like 'How much is it?', 'It's five dollars.', 'I want this.', 'May I help you?'.
sample: May I help you? How much is it? It's five dollars. I want this.

ja.prompt: 買い物の会話で値段を尋ねたり商品を買ったりしましょう。
ja.hint: 'How much is it?', 'It's five dollars.', 'I want this.', 'May I help you?' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: May I help you? How much is it? It's five dollars. I want this.

zh.prompt: 練習購物對話，問價格和買東西。
zh.hint: 使用 'How much is it?', 'It's five dollars.', 'I want this.', 'May I help you?' 等句子。
zh.sample: May I help you? How much is it? It's five dollars. I want this.

title: Talking About Daily Routines
prompt: Describe your daily routine including wake-up time and school time.
hint: Use phrases like 'I get up at six.', 'I go to school at seven thirty.', 'What time do you get up?'.
sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six. I go to school at seven thirty.

ja.prompt: 毎日の生活習慣について話しましょう。起きる時間や学校に行く時間など。
ja.hint: 'I get up at six.', 'I go to school at seven thirty.', 'What time do you get up?' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six. I go to school at seven thirty.

zh.prompt: 描述你的日常作息，包括起床時間和上學時間。
zh.hint: 使用 'I get up at six.', 'I go to school at seven thirty.', 'What time do you get up?' 等句子。
zh.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six. I go to school at seven thirty.

title: Talking About Animals at the Zoo
prompt: Count and talk about animals at the zoo.
hint: Use phrases like 'How many bears?', 'There are three bears.', 'Look, tigers!'.
sample: How many bears? There are three bears. Look, tigers!

ja.prompt: 動物園の動物について数えたり話したりしましょう。
ja.hint: 'How many bears?', 'There are three bears.', 'Look, tigers!' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: How many bears? There are three bears. Look, tigers!

zh.prompt: 數數並談論動物園的動物。
zh.hint: 使用 'How many bears?', 'There are three bears.', 'Look, tigers!' 等句子。
zh.sample: How many bears? There are three bears. Look, tigers!
